# Cherubs Cove Ministry — The Making Place

> An interdenominational ministry raising burning youths for the Lord. Home of the International Quivers Conference.

## About

Cherubs Cove is an interdenominational ministry committed to raising a generation on fire for God. We exist to equip, ignite, and release burning youths into every sphere of society, with the Gospel of Jesus Christ as our foundation and compass.

## Leadership

- **President**: Jesse Falodun — An OAP (On-Air Personality), Spoken Word Artist, and conference convener. Graduated from the International School of Ministry (2021) and Mass Communication from Kogi State University.

## Key Events

- **International Quivers Conference** — Annual flagship conference. Past themes: Arrows (2023), Awakening (2024), Forge (2024), Immersion (2025), Envoys of Light (2026).
- **First Saturday Service** — Monthly gathering (every 1st Saturday).
- **Mid-Week Gathering** — Prayer & fellowship (every Wednesday).

## Key Pages

- **Home** (`/`): Ministry introduction, hero section with scripture (Psalm 127:4), upcoming events preview.
- **About Jesse Falodun** (`/about-jesse`): Biography, ministry background, speaking engagements.
- **Events & Conferences** (`/events-conferences`): Upcoming, past, and recurring events with registration.
- **Past Conferences Archive** (`/past-conferences`): Photo galleries from past conference editions.
- **Resources** (`/resources`): Sermon audio, video teachings, and downloadable PDF study documents.
- **Connect** (`/connect`): Contact information, social media links, newsletter subscription.
- **Register** (`/register/:eventId?`): Event registration with custom form fields per event.

## Contact

- **Email**: cherubscove@gmail.com

- **Location**: Nigeria
- **Facebook**: https://www.facebook.com/share/182S9YeQMr/
- **YouTube**: https://www.youtube.com/@jefaldera
- **WhatsApp**: https://wa.me/2348179303228

## Core Beliefs

Interdenominational ministry focused on raising burning youths for the Lord. Part of the Cherubim and Seraphim Church tradition.

## Technical

- Built with React + TypeScript + Vite
- UI: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui components
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Storage, Edge Functions)
- PWA-enabled with offline support
- Admin panel at `/quiveradminconsole007`
